name: accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, inaccurate expense reporting causes cash flow gaps. We reconcile credit card statements with receipts instead of manual reconciliation processes using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inaccurate expense reporting due to mismatched receipts and credit card statements.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inaccurate expense reporting due to mismatched receipts and credit card statements.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, inaccurate expense reporting causes cash flow gaps. We reconcile credit card statements with receipts instead of manual reconciliation processes using spreadsheets.
